ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Estimated end date of the project */,
  "budget" REAL /* Total budget allocated for the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the project */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the client for the project */,
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project manager */,
  "contract_type" TEXT /* Type of contract (e.g., fixed-price, cost-plus) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "labor_resources" (
  "labor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each labor entry */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project */,
  "labor_type" TEXT /* Type of labor (e.g., skilled, unskilled) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of labor personnel allocated */,
  "cost_per_hour" REAL /* Cost per hour for labor */,
  "total_hours" REAL /* Total hours worked by labor personnel */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of labor allocation */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of labor allocation */,
  "labor_rate" REAL /* Rate at which labor is being paid */,
  "overtime_hours" REAL /* Overtime hours worked */,
  "overtime_rate" REAL /* Rate for overtime hours */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("labor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_labor_resources_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "materials" (
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each material entry */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project */,
  "material_type" TEXT /* Type of material (e.g., stone, brick, cement) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of material used */,
  "cost_per_unit" REAL /* Cost per unit of material */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the materials used */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier */,
  "material_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the material */,
  "material_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the material */,
  "material_grade" TEXT /* Grade or quality of the material */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_materials_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cost_estimations" (
  "estimation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cost estimation */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project */,
  "up_to_plinth" REAL /* Estimated cost up to plinth level */,
  "superstructure" REAL /* Estimated cost for superstructure */,
  "roofing" REAL /* Estimated cost for roofing */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total estimated cost for the project */,
  "estimation_date" TEXT /* Date when the cost estimation was made */,
  "estimated_labor_cost" REAL /* Estimated cost for labor */,
  "estimated_material_cost" REAL /* Estimated cost for materials */,
  "estimated_overhead_cost" REAL /* Estimated overhead costs */,
  "estimated_profit_margin" REAL /* Estimated profit margin */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("estimation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cost_estimations_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the supplier */,
  "material_types" TEXT /* Types of materials supplied by the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the supplier */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the supplier */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "deliveries" (
  "delivery_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each delivery */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project receiving the delivery */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier providing the materials */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the material being delivered */,
  "delivery_date" TEXT /* Date of delivery */,
  "quantity_delivered" INTEGER /* Quantity of materials delivered */,
  "delivery_note" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the delivery */,
  "expected_delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected delivery date */,
  "actual_delivery_date" TEXT /* Actual delivery date */,
  "delivery_status" TEXT /* Status of the delivery (e.g., pending, delivered, delayed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("delivery_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deliveries_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deliveries_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deliveries_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username used for logging into the system */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for user communication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the system (e.g., project manager, site supervisor) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project */,
  "can_edit" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user can edit project details */,
  "can_view" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user can view project details */,
  "can_approve" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user can approve project changes */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission (e.g., read, write, execute) */,
  "permission_level" TEXT /* Level of permission (e.g., project-level, company-level) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_phases" (
  "phase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project phase */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project */,
  "phase_name" TEXT /* Name of the phase (e.g., foundation, framing, roofing) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the phase */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the phase */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the phase (e.g., completed, in progress) */,
  "phase_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the phase */,
  "phase_manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manager responsible for the phase */,
  "phase_cost" REAL /* Estimated cost for the phase */,
  "phase_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("phase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_phases_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_phases_phase_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("phase_manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cost_records" (
  "cost_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cost record */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project */,
  "phase_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project phase */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost incurred for the phase */,
  "incurred_date" TEXT /* Date when the cost was incurred */,
  "cost_type" TEXT /* Type of cost (e.g., labor, material, overhead) */,
  "cost_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the cost */,
  "cost_category" TEXT /* Category of the cost (e.g., direct, indirect) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cost_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cost_records_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cost_records_phase_id FOREIGN KEY ("phase_id") REFERENCES project_phases ("phase_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the document is associated with */,
  "doc_name" TEXT /* Name of the document */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path of the document */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the document was uploaded */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., report, plan, invoice) */,
  "document_version" TEXT /* Version of the document */,
  "document_author_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the author of the document */,
  "document_status" TEXT /* Status of the document (e.g., draft, approved, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_documents_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_documents_document_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("document_author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user receiving the notification */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project related to the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date when the notification was created */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., project update, document upload) */,
  "notification_status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., unread, read) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)
